report.title: DLL Side-Loading Attempt on DESKTOP-80FLS88
report.explanation: The alert indicates a DLL Side-Loading attempt on the host DESKTOP-80FLS88 by the IP address 10.0.2.15.
attack_sequence: A Newly Scheduled Task has been Detected on DESKTOP-80FLS88

iocs.context: The process PotentiallyUnwanted.exe was loaded on the host DESKTOP-80FLS88.
The source IP of the alert is 10.0.2.15, which has a high risk score and a history of using various MITRE ATT&CK techniques.

remediation_steps.action: Investigate the incident further by querying more recent logs from the same IP address using `query_wazuh_logs(10.0.2.15, minutes)`.
Review the security configuration of the target host (DESKTOP-80FLS88) to ensure that it is properly secured against DLL Side-Loading attacks.
Update the Wazuh rules to include the DLL Side-Loading technique (T1574) to improve the detection of similar attacks in the future.
